meaning: adj.易膨胀的,易扩张的,广阔的,豪爽的,豪华的
examples: The spectra show that the stars must have swallowed such planets during their expansive, red-giant stage.
He was becoming more expansive as he relaxed.
She was clearly relaxed and in an expansive mood.
Because they are more expansive, people tended to leave them in the refrigerator longer.
International business schools typically can offer an expansive alumni network and recruitment opportunities across the world.
